title: 村庄地平线 Village Horizons +
description:
让MineCraft的村民们住上更好的房子（？

Let the villagers in MineCraft live in better houses.（？
body:
![picture](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e9772d437a53db393b5597199904bb6ae63b87f0.jpeg)
一个旨在“替换”原版村庄结构的数据包/模组（替换不是真正的替换，其实是新增，不修改原版村庄）
让村民住上更好的村庄！（偷笑
未来还可能会更新一些杂七杂八的结构，尽请期待！

目前已增加村庄列表：
v1.0.1 平原村庄（随机生成以下结构中的结构）:13种职业房屋，3种普通住房，2种中心地标；

A data datapack/mod designed to "replace" the original village structure (replacement is not a real replacement, it is actually a new addition, does not modify the original village)
Let villagers live in better villages! (Snickering.)
There may be some miscellaneous structures updated in the future, so please look forward to it!
(machine translation, please forgive me.)

The list of villages has been added:
v1.0.1 Plains Village (randomly generates structures among the following structures): 13 types of occupational houses, 3 types of normal houses, 2 types of central landmarks;
